findings.required_closure: Current-code complete inner/outer/family/feature-signature cache with full PIT population semantics, typed KDA routing, boundary mutation and cold/warm replay evidence.
Run the physical 11963-row execution registry through the actual orchestrator stages, A2 resolution, frozen materialization and aggregate/full-ledger equality.
Use physical 800-row controls and CacheAuthority frames for all 20 transformations, canonical seeds, chunk/worker/order/restart invariance and duplicate reconciliation.
Consume and update actual persistent state across ordered chunks/restarts; remove fabricated q49 state and complete transition/mutation coverage.
Run the exact CLI and full shadow campaign stages under the detached service, including real funding accounting, while retaining the passing Telegram/recovery evidence.
Measure the required production-shaped stratified workload, 1-to-logical-CPU scaling, RSS/I-O/output/reuse and conservative resource projection.
Exercise complete and genuine bound-stop terminal packages with all identities, forensics, independent recomputation and independently rehashed immutable inventory.
